objective: Verify Slopgate feedback-loop phases 0-7 with live rollout evidence
open_gates: Phase 4 remains open: the labeled live denial sample and canary duration are insufficient for a precision exit.
Phase 6 is not met: seven-day first-time resolution is 0.7256, below the 0.902 target.
completed_gates: PY-LOG-002 100-record evidence gate is complete with adjudicated review and replay artifacts.
Cross-platform hook rollout is installed and verified in advisory mode with blocking promotion disabled.
PY-CODE-012 advisory false positives found during canary were corrected and regression-tested.
decision: Do not promote blocking yet. Continue advisory canary evidence collection and FTR improvement work.
